name: IBM + Webify = Industry SOA Application Jumpstart
description: Analysis of IBM's acquisition of Webify Solutions and its strategic implications for the nascent SOA application development market. Argues that 'SOA Lite' general-purpose approaches are insufficient for enterprise needs and that IBM with Webify's industry-specific component library is positioned uniquely to provide Enterprise SOA with vertical market focus in insurance, healthcare, banking, and telecoms.
